\tzpentry{ID4958}{Holonomy Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4958 introduces Holonomy Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$ dr2)|r1-r2|3Lk = \\frac{1}{4\\\\pi}\\\\oint_{C\\_1}\\\\oint_{C\\_2}\\frac{(\\\\mathbf{r}\\_1-\\\\mathbf{r}\\_2)\\cdot(d\\\\mathbf{r}\\_1\\times d\\\\mathbf{r}\\_2)}{|\\\\mathbf{r}\\_1-\\\\mathbf{r}\\_2|\\^{}3}Lk=4$
\]
